[History](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint/Gallery?action=history) - [Purge](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint/Gallery?action=purge) - [Talk (0)](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Talk:Kroos_the_Keen_Glint/Gallery?action=edit&redlink=1) | | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Operator](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint "Kroos the Keen Glint") | [File](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint/File "Kroos the Keen Glint/File") | [Story](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos/Story "Kroos/Story") | [Overview](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint/Overview "Kroos the Keen Glint/Overview") | [Dialogue](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint/Dialogue "Kroos the Keen Glint/Dialogue") | **Gallery** | [Trivia](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint/Trivia "Kroos the Keen Glint/Trivia") | ## Outfits | Default | | --- | | ![Kroos the Keen Glint](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/2/2f/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint.png/revision/latest?cb=20220125055532) | An outfit commonly worn by [Operators](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Operator "Operator").
While not as practical as a uniform, it's what they find most comfortable. | | Elite 2 | | --- | | ![Kroos the Keen Glint Elite 2](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/2/22/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint_Elite_2.png/revision/latest?cb=20220125055448) | An outfit that has been improved after the [Operator](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Operator "Operator")'s [Promotion](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Promotion "Promotion").
Custom-made to suit each Operator's experiences and needs, these outfits are designed to provide them maximum flexibility on any battlefield. Furthermore, this is all done without compromising the comfort that they've come to expect. | | Along the Corridor | | --- | | ![Kroos the Keen Glint Skin 1](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/8/85/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint_Skin_1.png/revision/latest?cb=20230103092208) | One of Kroos the Keen Glint's casual outfits.
_Green tiles in the morning mist, warm freeze on yellow flowers. Step through the halls, step with the song. –Kroos' first [Yanese](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Yan "Yan") poem, translated_
0011 New Arrivals/Along the Corridor. Made by [Lungmen](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Lungmen "Lungmen") craftsmen from premium [Shangshu](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Shangshu "Shangshu") silk. Elegant and classical patterns with cyan lining make for a dignified outfit.
**Acquisition**
[Invitation to Wine Rerun](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Invitation_to_Wine_Rerun "Invitation to Wine Rerun") ( [Outfit Store](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Outfit_Store "Outfit Store"), 18 [![Originite Prime icon]()](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Originite_Prime "Originite Prime")) | Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Categories - [Categories](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Special:Categories "Special:Categories"): - [Kroos](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Kroos "Category:Kroos") - [Operator galleries](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Operator_galleries "Category:Operator galleries") [\[Configure Reference Popups\]](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Kroos_the_Keen_Glint/Gallery#configure-refpopups) Community content is available under [CC-BY-SA](https://www.fandom.com/licensing) unless otherwise noted.
